strengths: 19+ years of hands-on engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems, exceeding the 15-year minimum
Entrepreneurial track record: founded GISCollective (open-source geo-data platform) and built recent AI-agent infrastructure including MCP code generators
Demonstrated knowledge-sharing and community leadership through conference talks, multi-day courses, and workshops
concerns: Career has plateaued at Senior/Staff IC level with no evidence of Principal- or Director-level scope, strategy ownership, or executive/customer advisory work
AI experience is recent and narrow (agent tooling since 2025); no recognized AI expertise, shipped AI products at scale, or advanced degree in an AI field
Limited cloud-platform strategy depth — experience is product engineering (AWS CDK, Kubernetes usage) rather than defining future-state cloud/AI platforms

key_factors.factor: Seniority gap vs Director-level IC role
Shallow AI strategy and recognized-expertise credentials
Long, broad engineering experience with entrepreneurial projects

response.justification: The candidate comfortably meets the minimum bar (technical BS, ~19 years of engineering) and shows genuine breadth, craftsmanship, and entrepreneurial initiative. However, this role is a Director-level AI strategy position requiring recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI products, and the ability to advise strategic customers and shape platform direction — areas where the resume shows only about a year of recent AI-adjacent tooling work and no leadership beyond senior/staff IC delivery. Strong engineer, but a significant level and domain-authority mismatch for this specific role.
